metadata.summary: A coarse-grained OpenMM mechanics surrogate for peptide chain P in PDB 7T10 produces a force-extension descriptor with peak force 766.98959 pN at 2.4 nm extension; contact-derived anchoring makes high-contact residues the formal support for interpreting load-bearing positions.

payload.summary: A coarse-grained OpenMM mechanics surrogate for peptide chain P in PDB 7T10 produces a force-extension descriptor with peak force 766.98959 pN at 2.4 nm extension; contact-derived anchoring makes high-contact residues the formal support for interpreting load-bearing positions.

acceptance_criteria: receptor chain R and peptide chain P retained
prepared structure and preparation report hashed

inherited_needs.query: Prepare receptor-bound 7T10 peptide-receptor complex for atomistic OpenMM SMD, resolving cyclic/disulfide/terminal chemistry, missing atoms, termini, and protonation states.
inherited_needs.rationale: Amber/OpenMM templates resolve; receptor chain R and peptide chain P retained; prepared structure and preparation report hashed

inherited_needs.query: Run receptor-bound 7T10 steered-MD replicates across pulling axes, seeds, spring constants, and pulling speeds.
inherited_needs.rationale: three or more finite-force replicates; peak-force distribution reported; trajectory and force-extension traces retained

inherited_needs.query: Perturb W8, K9, F6, and F7 hotspots and quantify contact and mechanics changes relative to wild type.
inherited_needs.rationale: wild-type and mutant contact graphs; force-extension comparison table; effect-size ranking for hotspot mutations

inherited_needs.query: Track contact persistence and rupture order during SMD trajectories.
inherited_needs.rationale: time-resolved contact graph; rupture order for hotspot residues; persistent load-bearing edges reported

acceptance_criteria: evidence table mapped to hotspot residues

inherited_needs.query: Find SSTR2/somatostatin-14 binding, mutagenesis, SPR, cryo-EM, or AFM references constraining W8/K9/F6/F7 interpretations.
inherited_needs.rationale: source list with identifiers; evidence table mapped to hotspot residues; support/contradiction labels

inherited_needs.query: Synthesize only after prepared receptor-bound SMD, mutation comparison, rupture pathway, and experimental anchors exist.
inherited_needs.rationale: all parent artifact hashes included; confirmed/provisional/contradicted subclaims separated; formal audit passes

formal_result.invariance_statement: Descriptor is computed from sorted parent payload feature keys, parent formal-result kinds, and declared morphism; JSON field-order relabeling does not change the value.

models.mechanical_commitment: Force is summarized without extension dependence.
models.name: mean-force null model

models.mechanical_commitment: Tensile force varies with extension and can be linked to contact-localized anchoring.
models.name: linear force-extension model
models.reason: It explains the force trace with lower AIC and high R^2.

accepted_models.mechanical_commitment: Tensile force varies with extension and can be linked to contact-localized anchoring.
accepted_models.name: linear force-extension model
accepted_models.reason: It explains the force trace with lower AIC and high R^2.

selection_basis.decision_rule: Accept the model with lower AIC; require positive improvement over the simpler descriptor.

rejected_models.mechanical_commitment: Force is summarized without extension dependence.
rejected_models.name: mean-force null model

payload.why_preserved: Rejected explanatory paths are retained as categorical residual structure.

payload.decision_rule: Accept the model with lower AIC; require positive improvement over the simpler descriptor.

payload.accepted_model_advantage: The accepted model couples structural anchoring to tensile-response diagnostics.
payload.name: contact-only ablation
payload.result: Removing the force-extension trace leaves hotspot localization but no stiffness/work/peak-force mechanics claim.

payload.audit_claim: The richer regime preserves the old descriptor artifacts and adds explanatory mechanics content that was not present in the simple regime.
payload.richer_explanatory_mechanics_regime: contact concentration plus tensile model-selection regime

payload.limitations: The force trace is a single imported computational surrogate, not a measured ensemble or validated atomistic uncertainty estimate.
payload.scientific_claim: 7T10 supports a contact-localized tensile mechanics interpretation: a small hotspot set concentrates structural anchoring while the force trace passes a linear tensile-response gate with measurable stiffness, work, and peak force.
